headline: Moderna Is Up 14% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Vaccine Stocks Like Merck and Pfizer?
summary: Shares of Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) are up 14% to $68 and change in afternoon trading Friday, extending a remarkable run for the mRNA pioneer. Intraday, MRNA stock hit a new 52-week high of $69.29. The rally easily outpaces peer vaccine makers. Merck (NYSE:MRK) stock is up 2% to $128, while Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) stock trades up 2% ... Moderna Is Up 14% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Vaccine Stocks Like Merck and Pfizer?

headline: Bio-Techne (TECH) Soars 20% on Merck $11.3B Merger
summary: Bio-Techne Corp. (NASDAQ:TECH) is one of the 9 Stocks Winning by Double Digits. Bio-Techne rallied for a third straight day on Thursday, surging 20.08 percent to close at $70.70 apiece, as investors gobbled up shares following news that it is merging with pharmaceutical giant Merck for $11.3 billion.
